de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

Class CreateObjectBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • recoder.kit.Transformation
      • recoder.kit.TwoPassTransformation
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.RecoderModelTransformer
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.CreateObjectBuilder

  • public class CreateObjectBuilder
extends RecoderModelTransformer
    If an allocation expression new Class(...) occurs, a new object has to be created, in KeY this is quite similar to take it out of a list of objects and setting the implicit flag <created> to true as well as setting all fields of the object to their default values. For the complete procedure, the method creates the implicit method <createObject$gt; which on its part calls another implicit method lt;prepare> for setting the fields default values.
